title: Senior AI Engineer
description: Redrob AI is seeking a Senior AI Engineer to design, build, and deploy production-grade AI systems that power our intelligent recruitment platform. You will work at the intersection of NLP, information retrieval, and ML infrastructure to build candidate-matching engines, resume understanding pipelines, and ranking algorithms that serve millions of users.
responsibilities: Design and implement production ML pipelines for candidate ranking and matching
Build and fine-tune transformer-based NLP models for resume parsing, skill extraction, and semantic matching
Develop and maintain scalable inference services handling high-throughput, low-latency requirements
Collaborate with product and data teams to define ML-driven features and evaluation metrics
Mentor junior ML engineers and contribute to engineering best practices
Drive experimentation culture: design A/B tests, build evaluation harnesses, and analyze results
required_skills: PyTorch or TensorFlow (3+ years, model development and training)
NLP / Transformers / LLMs (2+ years, fine-tuning and deployment)
ML Systems Design (production pipelines, model serving, monitoring)
Cloud Platforms (AWS or GCP, including managed ML services)
Strong software engineering fundamentals (testing, CI/CD, code review)
preferred_skills: Experience with sentence-transformers and semantic search
Experience in HR-tech, recruitment, or talent platforms
rejected_backgrounds: Candidates with exclusively non-technical backgrounds (e.g., purely sales, marketing, or administrative roles)
Candidates whose ML experience is limited to academic coursework or MOOCs without professional application
Candidates with significant unexplained career gaps (>18 months) without evidence of continued learning
Candidates whose primary expertise is blockchain/Web3 with minimal demonstrable ML engineering experience

education.minimum: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or related field
education.preferred: Master's or PhD in Machine Learning, NLP, or related field

interview_process: Technical phone screen — ML fundamentals (60 min)
System design round — ML systems (60 min)
